item.title: I have never been so nervous
item.description: Edit: woah thank you for all the dm's. Yes, it's out for general public, but only at the "A word" online place. Also not on kindle yet just good old fashioned printed copy :) Thanks for all the best wishes

item.title: Hexia thigh high stockings
item.description:
Some Hexia, with a cute outfit I stole from a imgurian: @mouseyroxy1 saw the outfit on my fp today. https://imgur.com/gallery/feeling-cute-tht-LExZDRS Love your outfits! If you'd like to support me and see the booba version: https://www.patreon.com/miaormoa If you'd like to commission me or simply donate : https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
..i see nothing wrong here.. greetings online friends
Mr. Ping is my favorite. GOAT dad
trying to think of an example of this..
we could make it happen
i've already called the police
i want to be a part of that
dang
anyone know where/what?
finally
looks like it was an interesting dismount
as is tradition
that guy fucks
i have no issues with vga. regular usb is annoying to always guess wrong on the insert but it really has changed everything
mmm hmm
yes
reporters are always doing this
hat
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Memes and things vol 125
item.description:
YUP.
Every time.
Try them cold!
Gross.
It’s log! From BLAMO!
That’s show was a mess. They didn’t even actually fix the engines and stuff.
ACAB
Me: I’m gonna use my knees to squat real quick My knees: plz don’t
Love my friends. We play Dead By Daylight and talk shit every week
Gimme them Texickles
Riding with me is very cultured, then. My shuffle is a mess.
Love his lil curled up paws! T_T
item.dc:creator: razalude

item.title: Images of Note: Muffled heavy metal
item.description:
Frutiger aero certainly was a thing.
run
:O
No thoughts
and they don't stop coming
How do those sleeves work? HOW TO THOSE SLEEVES WORK?
O - O
touch grass
haha! Book!
Run
NO HORSES!
s o u p
At least one of Musk's kids is a regular poster on Threads.
T W I N K
You can't overthink if your heart stops!
This isn't some religious reason, all the Vegetables have denied the holy spirit.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: The 480th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - SPOOPY SEASON, Week 2 -- COSTUME SPECIAL
item.description:
YOU CAN HELP! SHARE YOUR COSTUME SELFIES ON HALLOWEEN!
Kids' first
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world' Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays
Kids with parents
Couples
And now a Palate Cleanser!
Spirit Halloween!
My addition at the bottom
SOUND ON!
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq -----FRESHLY UPDATED----- #Spooky #Spoopy #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: Day 3 of Making Selene cosplay from Underworld - by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/reel/DBRvkZfSWv_/ Hello everyone! Day 3 was the last day of this project, this was actually so fun to make I enjoyed making everything :) Next video I'll show you some photoshoot results. Let me know if you'd like a make up and hair tutorial for this cosplay, please! If there's interest I'll gladly make one :) Have a good day, Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

Splendid cover by Alex Melton cant seem to remember the song title.

Mark Korven
Michael Gerow & Lauren spencer smith
Marc Rebillet
Alina Gingertail on her domra

item.dc:creator: Freespirit84

item.title: Made myself some spoopy Halloween wheels
item.description:
Pipe cleaners, bike lights, lil spider dude.
I weaved one pipe cleaner around the center of the spokes. Then I twisted one pc around that, wrapping up the spoke. It took 2 pcs to cover the spoke. I had to make a fake spoke because I didn't want a wonky uneven web.
Lots of twisting
I twisted each pipe cleaner together as I went. That way I was able to avoid weaving a long chain.
The bike lights I use. It just wraps around the spoke.
Pipe cleanered my spoopy spider
Boom. Surprise lights.
Sisyphus all pimped out
Sisyphus is lit
item.dc:creator: itslikeavanthatsslowandbig

item.title: Another one
item.description: Had time to run off one more mask before an event tomorrow. Printed in Army Red from Polymaker. I painted the eyebrows, eyelashes , lips and teeth. Sound on for a chomp. File design by Pipe Cox.

Ella is not done rescuing you.

item.title: reblog if ur a striminal
item.description: Most viral, cool. Would love to see pics/art of your D&D or WoW characters! But really, just be kind to each other, and keep sailing the high seas.
item.dc:creator: rh82

item.title: After 7 months of living in my truck, I finally found a home!
item.description: I moved into my truck in April following the destruction of my cabin (long story). I went tree planting and finished the season in July. I started looking for a place, but having 2 dogs makes makes it a tough go. I finally found a good place with some good roommates, and I move in November 1st. I love being mobile, but 7 months in the back of a truck with 2 active dogs gets to you after a bit. Here's a dog tax featuring the 2 critters in question. They're named Sköll and Hati, and they're my best buds.
item.dc:creator: weareheretodrinkyourbeer
